note: Every endpoint here both answered our raw-socket probe AND delivered with measured headroom: sustained >= 1.1x realtime and a 3-second burst >= 1.5x the stream's own need, at <= 128 kb/s. Admission only rejects streams that cannot hold realtime with slack or exceed 128 kb/s; burst and sustained figures are kept per endpoint to rank alternates by recovery speed.
